title: Who in Eva doesnt have a trauma
display_title: Who in Eva doesnt have a trauma
wikitext:
[]: Who in Eva doesn't have a trauma?             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sat Nov 26, 2011 2:19 am i mean , the only person (i know) without trauma is Aoba ._. or maybe we can name each charas trauma like : Shinji : to be loved, father and mother traumas. Anything we share?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 26, 2011 2:23 am Kensuke and Hikari are, from what we see, pretty well-adjusted.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Nov 26, 2011 3:15 am Those two are surprisingly very normal compared to the rest of the cast (I also find it funny/delightful that their voice actors were also cast as supporting characters in another monumental show some 16 years later).

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Nov 26, 2011 7:54 am I knew about Saotome-sensei, but I did not know Madoka's father was Kensuke. This is truly WINx2 stuff!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:08 am Sachi wrote: Kensuke and Hikari are, from what we see, pretty well-adjusted.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:09 am NemZ wrote: Even the teacher is apparently so traumatized by 2nd impact that every lecture goes back to this topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:22 am It is interesting to learn that those two were a part of PMMM too. @topic I’d say Hyuga seems to be pretty well adjusted but he most likely has 2I trauma. I think it is safe to say that all characters have suffered trauma of some kind be that 2I trauma or the loss of a loved one

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:35 am Xard wrote: alternatively he's just senile

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Nov 26, 2011 11:04 am @ bridge-bunnies without trauma: they all have one in EoE at the latest.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Nov 26, 2011 2:51 pm Xard wrote: alternatively he's just senile

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Nov 26, 2011 3:32 pm Aoba because he's such a nihilistic cynic so he probably just shrugs off everything. Fuyutsuki has also got his head on pretty straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 26, 2011 4:40 pm NemZ wrote: Everyone in that class has a dead mom, remember, and since all of their their parents work for Nerv (directly or indirectly) it is to be assumed they pretty much have to have raised themselves. How much of Hikari's responsibility and Kensuke's otakudom are actually compensating for this underlying trauma? How much of Toji's 'manly pride' is just keeping up a brave face? Even the teacher is apparently so traumatized by 2nd impact that every lecture goes back to this topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Nov 26, 2011 4:44 pm Trajan wrote: Fuyutsuki has also got his head on pretty straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 26, 2011 4:58 pm I'm sure that all NERV employees are subjected to rigorous psychological screening as part of recruitment, and the stable ones get to wear orange jumpsuits and do all the useful background engineering work.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Nov 26, 2011 6:51 pm Sachi wrote: Kensuke and Hikari are, from what we see, pretty well-adjusted.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Nov 26, 2011 8:11 pm Kaji seems to have little trauma in his past, though his present situation throughout the series may have been considered enough.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:03 pm Who in Eva doesn't have a trauma? No one, that's who.

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:43 pm Trajan wrote: Fuyutsuki has also got his head on pretty straight.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 26, 2011 9:46 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: Hikari's bossiness as class rep may stem from having to take the place of a authoritative figure at home.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sun Nov 27, 2011 1:16 pm Maybe we should make a list of everyone in the series, ranging from least traumatized to most traumatized.
summary:
[]: Who in Eva doesn't have a trauma?             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sat Nov 26, 2011 2:19 am i mean , the only person (i know) without trauma is Aoba ._. or maybe we can name each charas trauma like : Shinji : to be loved, father and mother traumas. Anything we share?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 26, 2011 2:23 am Kensuke and Hikari are, from what
